data.title: Sol-Gel Technologies Prices $33.1 Million Oversubscribed Equity Offering to Advance SGT-610
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sol-Gel Technologies ( (SLGL) ) has provided an update.

On March 23, 2026, Sol-Gel Technologies entered into an underwriting agreement for an oversubscribed underwritten offering of 459,112 ordinary shares at $72.00 per share, for expected gross proceeds of about $33.1 million, with closing anticipated around March 25, 2026 subject to customary conditions. The capital raise, backed by new and existing institutional investors and led by TD Cowen and LifeSci Capital, is intended to fund continued development and pre-commercialization of lead candidate SGT-610 and bolster working capital, underscoring investor confidence in Sol-Gel’s late-stage dermatology pipeline and its positioning in rare oncology-related skin disorders.

The offering attracted participation from prominent healthcare-focused funds, potentially broadening Sol-Gel’s institutional shareholder base and enhancing its visibility in the biopharmaceutical capital markets. By directing most of the proceeds to SGT-610’s Phase 3 program and related activities, the company is reinforcing its strategic focus on Gorlin syndrome and high-frequency basal cell carcinoma opportunities, while the use of an effective shelf registration streamlines access to future financing as it advances its portfolio.

The most recent analyst rating on (SLGL) stock is a Hold with a $73.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sol-Gel Technologies stock, see the SLGL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SLGL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SLGL is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improving financial trajectory (strong 2025 revenue rebound, positive operating/free cash flow, and very low debt) tempered by continued losses and equity erosion. Technicals are mixed/neutral, and valuation is pressured by a negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SLGL stock, click here.

More about Sol-Gel Technologies

Sol-Gel Technologies Ltd. is a specialized dermatology company developing therapies for rare and serious skin diseases. Its lead investigational product, SGT-610 (patidegib gel, 2%), is a Phase 3, orphan- and breakthrough-designated topical hedgehog inhibitor for preventing new basal cell carcinoma lesions in Gorlin syndrome, alongside pipeline candidate SGT-210 and two FDA-approved products, TWYNEO and EPSOLAY.

Average Trading Volume: 27,465

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $184.4M

Copa Holdings ( (CPA) ) has provided an announcement.

Copa Holdings has called its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders for May 13, 2026, at Copa Airlines’ headquarters in Panama City, where Class A shareholders will vote on ratifying the election of Julianne Canavaggio as an independent director, and Class B shareholders will elect a slate of seven directors for two-year terms expiring at the 2028 meeting. Holders of Class A and Class B common stock of record as of March 6, 2026, are entitled to notice and, in the case of Class B, to vote, while Class A investors retain the option to revoke their standing proxy to the board chairman, and the Executive Chairman and CEO is scheduled to report on the company’s 2025 performance and 2026 outlook, underscoring the meeting’s importance for corporate governance and strategic transparency.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

Oriental Culture Holding ( (OCG) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 20, 2026, Oriental Culture Holding Ltd. held an Extraordinary General Meeting in Nanjing, China, where shareholders approved a major increase in the company’s authorized share capital from $500,000 to $5,505,000 through the creation of 91 million additional ordinary shares. Shareholders also granted the board broad authority to further raise authorized share capital over the next two years, up to a cap of $500 million, potentially giving the company significant flexibility to pursue future equity financings or strategic transactions.

In addition, shareholders approved a change of the company’s registered address in the Cayman Islands and adopted a Fourth Amended and Restated Memorandum and Articles of Association to reflect these structural changes and previously approved amendments. These actions collectively streamline the company’s corporate governance framework and expand its capital-raising capacity, which could affect future dilution, ownership structure, and strategic options for existing stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (OCG) stock is a Hold with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Oriental Culture Holding stock, see the OCG Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Hyorc Signs Bulgaria Waste-to-Methanol Development Agreement
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Hyorc Corporation ( (HYOR) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 24, 2026, HyOrc Corporation entered into a Binding Project Development and Technology Agreement with Bulgaria-based OnEnergy GreenPower EAD and On Energy EOOD to collaborate on a waste-to-methanol facility in Bulgaria using refuse-derived fuel as feedstock. Under the deal, HyOrc is appointed technology partner for Stage 3, responsible for the thermochemical conversion of RDF into green methanol and for providing the core technical and process design for the plant.

The planned facility is designed to process about 50,000 tonnes of RDF annually over roughly 330 operating days, with an expected daily throughput of 150–155 tonnes, subject to final engineering. The Agreement sets out HyOrc’s lead role in preparing technical materials for a potential submission to the European Union Innovation Fund, and includes provisions on technology exclusivity, continuity of its technical role, confidentiality, and compensation mechanisms if either party withdraws, underscoring the project’s strategic importance for HyOrc’s European expansion and technology deployment.

More about Hyorc Corporation

HyOrc Corporation operates in the clean energy and waste-to-fuels technology sector, focusing on thermochemical conversion processes that transform waste streams into low‑carbon fuels such as green methanol. The company positions itself as a technology provider for industrial‑scale facilities seeking to utilize refuse‑derived fuel and similar feedstocks to meet European decarbonization and circular-economy goals.

Average Trading Volume: 152,752

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $56.76M

data.title: EdgeMode Expands Spain Data Center Capacity and Equity
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

EdgeMode ( (EDGM) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 23, 2026, Edgemode, Inc. and its joint venture partners Blackberry, AIF and DC Estate Solutions Cayman Limited amended their existing joint venture to significantly expand the planned capacity of their Spain-based data centers to 4,350 MW. As part of the same addendum, stock options for 400,000,000 shares of Edgemode common stock previously granted to BAIF or its assignees were exchanged for an equal number of fully paid, non-assessable restricted common shares issued in a private, unregistered transaction under securities law exemptions, leaving all other joint venture terms unchanged.

The capacity increase underscores an aggressive scale-up of Edgemode’s European data center ambitions, signaling a substantial boost to its infrastructure footprint and potential computing output. The conversion of options into restricted equity consolidates BAIF’s stake in the company and may align partner incentives more tightly with the long-term performance of the joint venture, while avoiding the immediate dilution dynamics associated with future option exercises.

More about EdgeMode

Edgemode, Inc. operates in the data center and digital infrastructure sector, working through joint ventures to develop and expand large-scale data center capacity. The company collaborates with partners such as Blackberry, AIF and DC Estate Solutions Cayman Limited to build out facilities, including Spain-based data centers aimed at high-capacity computing operations.

Totaligent ( (TGNT) ) has shared an update.

On March 4, 2026, Totaligent, Inc. amended a previously signed binding letter of intent with Aetherium Medical that outlines terms for an acqui-hire in which Totaligent would acquire Aetherium’s team, business plan, intellectual property, and related assets in exchange for equity. data.title: Sanofi Wins FDA Breakthrough Therapy Status for Venglustat in Type 3 Gaucher Disease
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sanofi ( (SNY) ) has issued an update.

On March 18, 2026, Sanofi announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted Breakthrough Therapy designation to venglustat, its investigational oral glucosylceramide synthase inhibitor, for treating neurological manifestations of type 3 Gaucher disease. The designation, based on positive phase 3 LEAP2MONO data showing statistically significant neurological benefit versus standard enzyme replacement therapy and a generally well-tolerated safety profile, strengthens Sanofi’s position in rare diseases and sets the stage for global regulatory filings in 2026, potentially bringing the first targeted neurologic treatment option to GD3 patients who currently lack approved therapies for these symptoms.

The LEAP2MONO phase 3 trial compared once-daily oral venglustat with biweekly intravenous enzyme replacement in GD3 patients already stabilized for systemic disease, meeting primary endpoints on measures of ataxia and cognition over 52 weeks. With prior fast-track and orphan designations in major markets, the new Breakthrough status is expected to expedite development and review in the U.S., underscoring the drug’s potential clinical and commercial importance for Sanofi and offering hope of improved outcomes for a small, underserved patient population.

The most recent analyst rating on (SNY) stock is a Hold with a $57.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sanofi stock, see the SNY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SNY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SNY is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial resilience and a constructive earnings outlook (growth, margin expansion, and buybacks). Valuation is supportive with a reasonable P/E and strong dividend, while weaker technical trend signals (below major moving averages and negative MACD) temper the overall rating.

To see Spark’s full report on SNY stock, click here.

Sanofi is an R&D-driven, AI-powered biopharmaceutical company that develops medicines and vaccines for millions of people worldwide. Leveraging its expertise in the immune system and a broad innovative pipeline, the Paris-based group focuses on addressing urgent healthcare challenges, and is listed on Euronext Paris and Nasdaq under the tickers SAN and SNY.

data.title: Dr. Reddy’s Tightens Insider-Information Disclosure Code After Board Approval
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Dr Reddy’s Laboratories ( (RDY) ) has shared an update.

On March 24, 2026, Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories’ board approved an amended Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosures of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information, aligning its internal framework with India’s SEBI insider trading and listing regulations. The updated code formalizes roles such as the Chief Investor Relations Officer, reinforces uniform and timely market disclosure, restricts selective and social media sharing of sensitive information, and mandates structured digital record-keeping and controls over legitimate access, signalling a tighter compliance posture for investors and regulators.

The company committed to promptly disseminating any inadvertent leaks of unpublished price-sensitive information, including within 24 hours of discovery, and to documenting investor interactions via website postings where required. The board also instituted detailed rules for sharing sensitive information for legitimate business purposes and for maintaining an eight-year digital database of who shares and receives such data, underscoring an operational focus on transparency, governance and mitigation of insider trading risks.

On March 24, 2026, The LGL Group, Inc. announced that its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders is scheduled for May 12, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET at the Harvard Club of New York City, followed by an investor meeting at 10:00 a.m. ET at the New York Stock Exchange. With engineering and design roots dating back to 1917, LGL has evolved from its origins as Lynch Glass Machinery, a glass-forming equipment maker, into a diversified owner-operator in precision engineering, manufacturing and services. data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Earth Science Tech ( (ETST) ) has provided an update.

On March 24, 2026, Earth Science Tech, Inc. announced the official launch of MyOnlineConsultation.com through its MOCTeledoc, LLC unit, completing what it describes as a fully vertically integrated telehealth and pharmacy ecosystem. The platform connects a credentialed prescriber network with ETST’s compounding pharmacies, including RxCompound and Mister Meds, as well as external pharmacies, and will be marketed nationwide under the consolidated Peaks brand.

Following a cash-flow-positive beta phase, MOCTeledoc is positioned as a lean, scalable division that management expects to become a significant revenue stream alongside ETST’s compounding and direct-to-consumer businesses, which generated $25.9 million in revenue for the nine months ended December 31, 2025. By offering turnkey telehealth technology, clinical staffing and integrated fulfillment, the launch is intended to drive cross-divisional synergies, strengthen ETST’s competitive standing in digital health and create a more efficient funnel of prescriptions into its in-house pharmacy operations.

The most recent analyst rating on (ETST) stock is a Hold with a $0.11 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Earth Science Tech stock, see the ETST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ETST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ETST is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (profitable operations, positive free cash flow, and minimal leverage). This is partially offset by weak technicals (price below key moving averages with negative MACD) and only moderate valuation support (P/E ~10.5, with no dividend yield data).

To see Spark’s full report on ETST stock, click here.

More about Earth Science Tech

Earth Science Tech, Inc. is a diversified holding company in the health and wellness sector, operating a vertically integrated portfolio that includes compounding pharmacies, telemedicine platforms and targeted healthcare facilities. Through subsidiaries such as RxCompoundStore.com, Mister Meds, Peaks Curative, DOConsultation.com and Las Villas Health Care, it provides sterile and non-sterile medications, personalized care and telemedicine connectivity across a growing network of U.S. states.

The company also manages Avenvi, a real estate and asset management arm, and MagneChef, a direct-to-consumer brand built on proprietary kitchen-product IP. An announcement from Roma Green Finance Limited ( (ROMA) ) is now available.

Roma Green Finance Limited has called an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders to be held in Hong Kong on April 15, 2026, with March 19, 2026 set as the record date for voting eligibility. The board is soliciting proxies from holders of its Class A, Class B and undesignated shares, encouraging investors to vote even if they do not attend in person.

At the meeting, shareholders will vote on an ordinary resolution authorizing a share consolidation across all classes at a ratio between one-for-two and one-for-250, with the exact ratio and timing to be set by the board by October 12, 2026. The proposal would give directors broad discretion to implement or abandon the consolidation and to manage fractional entitlements, underscoring the company’s effort to preserve flexibility over its capital structure and potential share price normalization, a move of particular relevance to Nasdaq-listed issuers facing minimum price and liquidity considerations.

More about Roma Green Finance Limited

Roma Green Finance Limited is an exempted company incorporated in the Cayman Islands with limited liability and listed on Nasdaq under the ticker ROMA. The company is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong, and has a share capital structure comprising Class A ordinary shares, Class B ordinary shares and undesignated shares, all with a par value of US$0.001 each.

On March 24, 2026, PMGC Holdings said its subsidiary SVM Machining, Inc. has completed registration under the International Traffic in Arms Regulations, confirming compliance with U.S. export-control rules for defense articles and services. Banco Latinoamericano De Comercio ( (BLX) ) has issued an announcement.

At its March 2026 Investor Day, Bladex reported that it reached or exceeded its ambitious 2026 financial and operational goals ahead of schedule, including expanding its commercial portfolio, improving lending spreads and cost-to-income, strengthening capital ratios, and lifting return on equity while sharply increasing non-interest income. Management highlighted gains in client base, cross-selling, automation and process efficiency, and noted that since 2021 the bank has outperformed key Latin American and U.S. financial benchmarks in cumulative total shareholder return.

The bank outlined a 2030 vision built on disciplined balance-sheet growth, lower funding costs via operating deposits, and a larger contribution from non-interest income, underpinned by cost efficiency and risk discipline to sustain a 16–17% ROE with lower earnings volatility. A central plank is the formal launch of transactional and correspondent banking, using Bladex’s New York Fed access, long-standing regional relationships and trade expertise to offer payment and cash-management services, deepen deposit funding, and exploit “white space” in a fragmented Latin American banking market, particularly among underserved institutions that meet its compliance standards.

data.title: Actelis Networks to Acquire Exaware, Enter AI Networking
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Actelis Networks, Inc. ( (ASNS) ).

On March 24, 2026, Actelis Networks announced it had signed a binding term sheet to acquire all shares of Israel-based Exaware Ltd. in an all-stock deal, aiming to enter the fast-growing AI-driven data center networking market. The move, which would combine Actelis’ secure edge and hybrid fiber capabilities with Exaware’s high-throughput routing and switching platforms, is intended to create an integrated, cyber-hardened architecture spanning edge, aggregation, and data center environments.

Under the proposed terms, the post-transaction value split is expected to be roughly 40% attributable to Actelis and 60% to Exaware, with 19.9% of Actelis’ outstanding common stock issued at closing and the remainder in non-voting preferred shares convertible later, subject to Nasdaq and regulatory requirements. The transaction, targeted to close by May 7, 2026, remains contingent on definitive agreements, board and regulatory approvals, and includes a 60-day no-shop period and a breakup fee, positioning Actelis to compete more directly in AI-driven network modernization if completed.

The most recent analyst rating on (ASNS) stock is a Hold with a $0.41 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Actelis Networks, Inc. stock, see the ASNS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ASNS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ASNS is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by weak financial performance—ongoing operating losses, volatile revenue/margins, and persistent negative operating/free cash flow—partly tempered by improved leverage. Technicals also weigh on the score given the sharp longer-term downtrend and negative MACD. Corporate events add meaningful risk due to Nasdaq delisting uncertainty and financing-related setbacks, while valuation provides limited support because earnings are negative and no dividend yield is indicated.

To see Spark’s full report on ASNS stock, click here.

More about Actelis Networks, Inc.

Actelis Networks, Inc. is a NASDAQ-listed provider of hybrid fiber, cyber-hardened networking solutions focused on rapid deployment for wide-area IoT and broadband applications. Its platforms deliver fiber-grade performance over hybrid fiber-copper networks for government, intelligent transportation, military, utility, rail, telecom, and campus customers, and include AI-based cyber monitoring to secure edge devices.

Exaware Ltd., founded in 2008 and based in Israel, develops high-throughput routing, switching, and open networking solutions for data center, telecom, and high-capacity aggregation environments. The company leverages disaggregated IP/MPLS and open networking architectures to serve carriers and infrastructure operators, and has recently expanded its role in data center networking while maintaining carrier-grade routing offerings.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell
